decisions.title: Deploy Redpanda & Sift Application to EC2 Infrastructure
decisions.context: ENG-9176 and ENG-9172 signal major infrastructure shifts. Critical for scalability and performance of Sift Edge (moat-building). Impacts data ingestion pipeline reliability for Explore V2 and Canvas.

arguments.for: Enables horizontal scaling for streaming data; reduces vendor lock-in; supports 10x decision capture growth needed for North Star metric
arguments.against: Increases operational complexity; requires new monitoring/alerting infrastructure; team learning curve on Redpanda ops

decisions.title: Implement SCIM User Lifecycle Management Controls
decisions.context: ENG-9926, ENG-9925, ENG-9784, ENG-9785, ENG-9788 show critical SCIM gaps causing customer incidents (Impulse Space). Enterprise SSO is table stakes for 'Embed Deeper' pillar. Multiple security/audit issues detected.
decisions.blockedBy: ENG-9783 (testing infrastructure) and ENG-9614 (metrics/alerting) must complete first

arguments.for: Prevents customer incidents; unblocks enterprise deals; required for SOC2/FedRAMP; improves admin visibility per ENG-9926
arguments.against: Requires coordination across auth, API, and frontend teams; may delay Python Rules launch if resources diverted

decisions.title: Raise Calculated Channels Nesting Limit
decisions.context: ENG-9929 indicates customers hitting architectural limits. Directly impacts 'Nail the Core' - customers can't build complex decision logic. Python Rules (Q2 launch) may exacerbate if limit stays.

arguments.for: Quick win for power users; unblocks advanced Canvas use cases; minimal eng effort based on ticket complexity
arguments.against: May mask underlying performance issues; should validate use cases before increasing limits blindly

decisions.title: Prioritize CSRS DataFusion Migration for Performance
decisions.context: ENG-9460 and ENG-9494 show CSRS modernization underway. Critical for Explore V2 query performance ('Nail the Core'). Downsampling work (ENG-7920) suggests current system struggling with scale.

arguments.for: 10-100x query performance improvement expected; enables real-time Ask SIFT; supports FedRAMP compliance (ENG-9684)
arguments.against: Large architectural change; risk of data inconsistency during migration; requires extensive testing

decisions.title: Address ABAC Authorization Gaps for Collections
decisions.context: ENG-9761 indicates ABAC rollout incomplete. Blocks 'Embed Deeper' for multi-tenant customers. User attribute sync caching (ENG-9871) shows performance work happening but feature incomplete.

arguments.for: Required for enterprise data isolation; enables Canvas sharing in regulated industries; aligns with 'Build the Moat' via security differentiation
arguments.against: Complex permission model increases support burden; may confuse existing users during transition

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting load (80% of working hours) limiting strategic thinking time. 3 one-on-ones focused on SCIM incident response and CSRS migration planning.
alerts: 30 Linear tickets updated this week - signal detection working but decision backlog forming

Infrastructure decisions (Redpanda, CSRS) need dedicated architecture review session
